text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I go see a movie to relax, and when I come out...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
H-hello. You're a trainer from the academy,
right? Did you also happen to watch this movie?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
R-really?! If you don't mind, I'd love to know what
you thought of it.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for asking all of a sudden. It's just... this
movie is based off one of my favorite books.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm so happy it got a movie adaptation, I can't
help but want to know what others thought of it!
choice_data_list: That final car chase was amazing.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes! That scene had me at the edge of my seat
too!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It's no wonder speed and tension are such
important elements for movies...
choice_data_list: They sure make things exciting, huh?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes, you're right! I feel like I've learned
something new.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
By the way, in the novel, the hero and heroine
originally confessed to each other while fleeing
on foot...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But I think the scene gained a lot more presence
after being changed to a car chase. The stunt
driving was breathtaking as well!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I wish they focused more on the subtleties of their
emotions, though. For example, they could've
abandoned the car and gone on foot so that...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
O-oh! Sorry for rambling... I didn't mean to get so
carried away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy's fangirling is just as fast-paced
and action-packed as the film.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I know just what you mean! The visuals were
stunning, and they perfectly captured the world
and atmosphere that was in the book.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The musical score was a perfect accompaniment
too. Listening to it really refreshed me.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I feel so energized, I'm sure I can do my
very best during training tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And the more I train, the stronger I'll become,
which means I'm sure to do well in my next race!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And if I keep winning, my life will become its own
story...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Then someone will write a book about me, and
it'll get its own movie adaptation, and...
choice_data_list: I'll go see it if they make a movie of your life.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Gasp! No way... Did I say all that out loud?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah! Please forget everything I said!
